name: smart-agriculture
description: Smart Agriculture monorepo: Next web platform + Python soil moisture agent + Docker infrastructure.

scripts.dev:web: bash -lc 'source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && npm --prefix apps/web run dev'
scripts.dev:agent: bash -lc 'LOAD_ROOT_ENV_EXCLUDE_PATTERN="^AGENT_PORT$"; source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && PYTHONPATH=apps/agent .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --app-dir apps/agent --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${AGENT_PORT:-18010}'
scripts.start:web: bash -lc 'source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && npm --prefix apps/web run start'
scripts.start:agent: bash -lc 'LOAD_ROOT_ENV_EXCLUDE_PATTERN="^AGENT_PORT$"; source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh && PYTHONPATH=apps/agent .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/agent --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${AGENT_PORT:-18010}'
scripts.qa:soil:formal: bash -lc 'source scripts/dev/load-root-env.sh; set -euo pipefail; test -x .venv/bin/python || { echo "缺少 .venv/bin/python"; exit 1; }; test -n "${HEALTH_PASSWORD:-}" || { echo "缺少 HEALTH_PASSWORD"; exit 1; }; LOCAL_AGENT_PORT=$(test -f .runtime/local-agent-port && cat .runtime/local-agent-port || echo 18010); export BASE_WEB=${BASE_WEB:-http://localhost:3000}; export BASE_AGENT=${BASE_AGENT:-http://localhost:${LOCAL_AGENT_PORT}}; export FORMAL_AGENT_URL=${FORMAL_AGENT_URL:-${BASE_AGENT}/chat}; echo "[gate 1/2] local smoke"; BASE_WEB="$BASE_WEB" BASE_AGENT="$BASE_AGENT" bash scripts/health/check-local.sh; echo "[gate 2/2] formal acceptance (56 cases)"; env -u ALL_PROXY -u all_proxy -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u http_proxy -u https_proxy FORMAL_AGENT_URL="$FORMAL_AGENT_URL" .venv/bin/python testdata/agent/soil-moisture/scripts/generate_formal_acceptance_report.py; echo "formal acceptance report: $(pwd)/testdata/agent/soil-moisture/outputs/formal-acceptance-report.md"'
